# Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (ESLint + Prettier + tests)
- [ ] New pure logic lives in `lib/` with a test in `test/`
- [ ] `app.js` / `stickfighter.js` remain **classic scripts** — no `import`/`export`, no IIFE wrapper (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] Verified the change in a browser (`npm run serve`) if it touches site behavior
